item.title: Aotearoa New Zealand
item.description: A Pacific P-TECH facilitator says young people need stronger digital and AI skills to keep up with fast-changing tech and warns Pacific learners risk being left behind without proper support.
item.content:encoded: A Pacific P-TECH facilitator says young people need stronger digital and AI skills to keep up with fast-changing tech and warns Pacific learners risk being left behind without proper support.

item.title: Moana Pasifika rescue must be more than a bailout, says academic Professor Steven Ratuva says New Zealand should treat saving the club as a long-term Pacific partnership, not just another rugby funding project.
item.description: Professor Steven Ratuva says New Zealand should treat saving the club as a long-term Pacific partnership, not just another rugby funding project.

item.title: Cook Islands
item.description: Pacific rugby leaders say professional pathways, local development and Pacific-led decision-making must be protected as support grows for Kanaloa Rugby's bid to take over Moana Pasifika.
item.content:encoded: Pacific rugby leaders say professional pathways, local development and Pacific-led decision-making must be protected as support grows for Kanaloa Rugby's bid to take over Moana Pasifika.

item.title: Moana Pasifika bow out with pride after heroic emotional farewell win Patrick Pellegrini stars as Moana Pasifika end their final Super Rugby Pacific season with a memorable victory over the ACT Brumbies in Canberra.
item.description: Patrick Pellegrini stars as Moana Pasifika end their final Super Rugby Pacific season with a memorable victory over the ACT Brumbies in Canberra.

item.title: Fiji crush Tonga 74-26 to stay unbeaten in men’s netball series The Fijians have extended their winning run at the Men’s Invitational Series as both sides build towards the inaugural 2028 World Cup.
item.description: The Fijians have extended their winning run at the Men’s Invitational Series as both sides build towards the inaugural 2028 World Cup.
